texto: Capability doesn't equal intent, Doctor. Do you want what she knows or not? Because if you keep looking at her like the caged lab rat, she'll keep looking at you like the evil bloody scientist with the big syringe.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Joel Shepherd: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Capability doesn't equal intent, Doctor. Do you want what she knows or not? Because if you keep l…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, power, looking pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
